projects.title: OpenApply
projects.problem: Applicants needed deadlines, guides, and support in one place.
projects.built: Built a scholarship workspace with tools, training, and applicant guidance.
projects.result: Delivered a clearer starting point for scholarship workflows.

projects.title: SignalSponsor
projects.problem: Teams needed a clearer way to turn scattered files into a sponsorship case.
projects.built: Built document intake, signal extraction, and explainable recommendation flows.
projects.result: Made sponsorship reviews easier to inspect and defend.

projects.title: Dependency Migration Planner
projects.tagline: Detect risky dependencies and map a realistic migration path.
projects.problem: Teams needed early risk detection before abandoned packages broke production work.
projects.built: Built repo scanning, dependency risk scoring, and staged migration planning.
projects.result: Produced practical migration guidance for JS/TS repositories.

projects.title: Legacy Systems Analysis Pipeline
projects.tagline: Local architecture reports for large codebases.
projects.problem: Large systems needed readable architecture and traceability outputs without moving code off machine.
projects.built: Built a local Python/SQL pipeline for reports, diagrams, and architecture maps.
projects.result: Generated architecture views for 100K+ LOC workflows.

projects.title: Client Websites & Reporting Workflows
projects.tagline: Freelance web delivery for small businesses and personal brands.
projects.problem: Clients needed maintainable websites plus lightweight dashboards and reporting systems.
projects.built: Built and deployed 8+ websites with dashboards, reporting workflows, scripting, Git-based iterations, and client-facing features.
projects.result: Delivered production-ready websites and cleaner client operations across multiple engagements.
